flag on the component lower bounds.

briefdescription.para: Computation of component frequency distributions (EM estimator of a mixture of discrete distributions).

parameterdescription.para: theoretical sample size of the frequency distribution.

briefdescription.para: Correction of component frequency distributions in the case of a binomial or a Poisson distribution.

parameterdescription.para: minimum lower bound of the support.

briefdescription.para: Test of the component order in the case of a mixture combining components of different parametric families.
